templates.name: Beginner 5" 6S Freestyle (Bardwell-style)
templates.description: Forgiving, accessible 5-inch 6S build aimed at first-time pilots. Lower KV motors, in-stock budget parts, all-in-one FC+ESC for simpler soldering.
templates.notes: AIO FC + 55A ESC reduces solder joints. CNHL 4S is forgiving on amp draw.

templates.name: Premium 5" 6S Freestyle (Armattan)
templates.description: Premium 5-inch freestyle with lifetime-warranty frame, top-tier motors, premium HD video. Built to last and to abuse.
templates.notes: Walksnail HD ecosystem end-to-end. H7 FC for INAV / ArduPilot bench mode.

templates.name: 5" Race 6S (high-thrust)
templates.description: Race-class 5" build with high-KV T-Motor F40 Pro V 2150KV for maximum punch on tight courses.
templates.notes: Analog race setup. 6S 1300 100C+ pack mandatory for amp draw.

templates.name: 7" Long-Range Cruise
templates.description: Long-range 7" build with 4S Li-ion for endurance, low-KV motors for efficiency, HD video, and long-range Crossfire control.
templates.notes: H7 FC for INAV / GPS support. Crossfire LoRa control extends range beyond 5.8GHz video.

templates.name: 10" Heavy-Lift Cinelifter
templates.description: 10-inch heavy-lift platform for carrying a GoPro / cine camera, or for endurance mapping with a 4-6S Li-ion pack.
templates.notes: DJI O3 for 4K onboard recording. INAV / ArduPilot on H7 for autonomous mapping.

templates.name: Skywalker X8 Flying-Wing Endurance
templates.description: Long-endurance flying-wing platform for survey / FPV cruise. 90+ min on 4S 5200 Li-ion.
templates.notes: INAV or ArduPilot on H7. Crossfire long-range RX for >30km. Walksnail HD for FPV cruise.

templates.name: Tinywhoop Indoor 1S (BetaFPV-style)
templates.description: Sub-50g indoor cinewhoop on 1S HV. Quietest, smallest, easiest entry to FPV.
templates.notes: Pavo Pico II uses an integrated AIO board (not in catalog as standalone). 1S BT2.0 packs only.

templates.name: Sub-250g 3.5" Cinematic Toothpick
templates.description: Sub-250g cinematic toothpick for recreational / regulatory-friendly flying. 4S 1300mAh pack.
templates.notes: GEPRC SMART 35 HD is sold as a complete RTF/BNF. Catalog uses the frame as the airframe entry; motors / ESC integrated.

templates.name: BetaFPV Pavo20 Pro 2" Cinewhoop (DJI O3)
templates.description: 2" ducted cinewhoop with DJI O3 air unit for cinematic indoor / pass-through footage.
templates.notes: BetaFPV publishes 1404 motors on the Pavo20 Pro stock build — not yet in catalog. Substitute when stocked.

templates.name: 5" Freestyle with DJI O3 HD
templates.description: 5" freestyle build with DJI O3 air unit for premium HD recording + low-latency video.
templates.notes: Premium DJI O3 setup with 4K30 onboard. Dual-band ELRS RX for range insurance.

templates.name: 5" Long-Range Cruise (efficient)
templates.description: Cruise-tuned 5" with low-KV motors and 4S 1500 pack for ~10 min smooth cruise on analog video.
templates.notes: Crossfire LoRa control + analog video for longer-range than HD.

templates.name: Volantex Raptor 660mm Pusher FW
templates.description: Compact foam fixed-wing pusher with Li-ion endurance pack. Forgiving beginner FW platform.
templates.notes: PWM RX for direct servo control on FW. INAV / ArduPilot on H7 for return-to-home.
